examples: She had the combined talents of toughness, intellect, experience and unsullied reputation.
Now, unsullied from its tireless journey.
He will do anything to keep it unsullied, and save his fine reputation.
Instead, the reward is seeing one of the last corners of the planet unsullied by civilization.
In this atmosphere the BNP, posing as unsullied avengers, might have been expected to do even better.
